name: Battlewasp - Twinbow the Attacker
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｂ・Ｆ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビー・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>連</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>撃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のツインボウ
name_jp_tl: Bee Force - Twinbow the Multiple Attacker
desc: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Insect monsters. You can only use this effect of "Battlewasp - Twinbow the Attacker" once per turn. This card can make a second attack during each Battle Phase.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Insect monsters. You can only use this effect of "Battlewasp - Twinbow the Attacker" once per turn. This card can make a second attack during each Battle Phase.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Insect monsters. You can only use this effect of "Battlewasp - Twinbow the Attacker" once per turn. This card can make a second attack during each Battle Phase.

jp_sets.set: Collection Pack: Duelist of Revolution Version

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
